signals.title: NZD/JPY — G8 Bilateral Theme + RBNZ Hawkish Shift
signals.text: NZD/JPY at 113.978 — NZD outperformance dominates the G8 scorecard following RBNZ signals for faster and larger rate hikes. This hawkish shift creates a sharp divergence against the JPY, which remains the G8 laggard despite positive CESI data (+12). The 150bp NZD/USD carry advantage and 360bp AUD/JPY spread highlight the broader JPY funding role. NZD/USD COT LF net short -15,435 (28% long) vs RBNZ hike bias creates a significant short-squeeze risk if the 0.6000 level is reclaimed.

signals.title: USD/JPY — Carry + Intervention Risk + Retail Divergence
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.288 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the pair's bid despite soft Tokyo CPI data. Retail sentiment is at an extreme 80% short, diverging from the institutional JPY COT LF net short of -81,624. This positioning mismatch suggests retail is prematurely fading the carry trend. 160.00 remains the critical watch level for BoJ verbal warnings or direct intervention; a sustained break above targets 162.00.

signals.title: GBP/USD — Volatility Premium + Positioning Risk
signals.text: GBP/USD at 1.3417 — Options market pricing significant protection with IV at 11.0% vs HV30 6.3%, resulting in a +4.7% VRP. Despite neutral carry (0bp spread), GBP COT LF net long is +30,708 (64.8% long), making the pair vulnerable to a long-unwind if US data continues to outperform (USD CESI +19). 25d RR at -0.71 confirms a persistent put skew as traders hedge downside risk despite the recent consolidation.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Inflation Divergence + Volatility Premium
signals.text: EUR/USD at 1.1646 — Mixed Eurozone inflation data (German states cooling vs French HICP at 2.8%) keeps the ECB on hold (2.00%). The 175bp Fed-ECB carry advantage favors USD, supported by a +2.9% VRP (IV 7.1% vs HV30 4.2%) indicating elevated hedging demand. DXY vs SPX correlation at -0.575 (z=+1.74σ) suggests USD is beginning to trade on funding stress rather than just rate differentials. Watch 1.1600 for technical support.
